data.description: A Commander for modern Go (golang) CLI interactions
data.about: Cobra is both a library for creating powerful modern CLI applications as well as a program to generate applications and command files.

data.headline: Solve CLI Boilerplate with Zero Friction.
data.pain: Writing CLI tools manually means handling flag parsing, subcommands, and help generation from scratch.
data.cure: Cobra handles everything automatically, so you can focus on building your app's core logic.
features: Nested subcommands out of the box

data.headline: Standard Library—But Smarter.
data.takeaway: Cobra scales from a simple tool to a massive CLI effortlessly.

points.title: Viper Integration
points.desc: Seamlessly integrates with Viper for advanced configuration management.

points.title: Intelligent Suggestions
points.desc: Provides 'Did you mean this?' style suggestions for typos automatically.

points.title: Automatic Autocomplete
points.desc: Generates bash, zsh, fish, and powershell autocomplete scripts automatically.

points.title: Subcommand Modularity
points.desc: Encourages a clean architecture with separate files and packages for subcommands.

data.headline: Add This to Your Go.mod Today.
